name: Mogilev Region (Belarus)

colors.symbolism: the golden shield of the arms
the roundel bearing the Madonna and Child

description: A red field bearing the coat of arms of Mogilev Region: a golden shield showing the Madonna and Child in a blue roundel above a green mound with red ears of wheat, over a blue ribbon.
history: Mogilev Region (Mahilyow Voblast) is the eastern region of Belarus, bordering Russia and centred on Mogilev. Its flag places the regional arms on a red field and was adopted in 2005.
